label: Live Search (productSearch)

provisioning.label: Live Search
provisioning.help: Enable in the Commerce admin: Commerce Services Connector + SaaS data export + Live Search. https://experienceleague.adobe.com/en/docs/commerce-merchant-services/live-search

postNote: Live Search is AI-powered (Sensei). Send the productSearch query through API Mesh / the Catalog endpoint; the EDS storefront consumes it via @dropins/storefront-product-discovery.
